scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace lean-ctx-client run build && npm -ws run typecheck
scripts.quickstart: npm --workspace lean-ctx-client run build && npm --workspace @leanctx/example-quickstart-cli start
scripts.memory-playground: npm --workspace lean-ctx-client run build && npm --workspace @leanctx/example-memory-policy-playground start
scripts.graph-explorer: npm --workspace lean-ctx-client run build && npm --workspace @leanctx/example-knowledge-graph-explorer dev
